task_completion.description: Open the 'Legacy ERP - Windows 2008' risk record for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface showing the edit screen or details specifically for the risk titled 'Legacy ERP - Windows 2008'.

task_completion.description: Set the Risk Mitigation Strategy to 'Accept'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field for 'Risk Mitigation Strategy' (or similar) showing 'Accept' as the chosen value.

task_completion.description: Set the Next Review Date to '2025-12-31'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date picker or text input field for 'Next Review Date' showing the exact date '2025-12-31'.

task_completion.description: Include the required text about the Board Directive in the risk description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area for the risk description containing the text 'Risk formally accepted by Board Directive 2025-Q1 pending cloud migration.' (or at minimum 'Board Directive 2025-Q1').

task_completion.description: Attach the 'CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf' document to the risk record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload section, attachment list, or file picker dialog showing 'CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf' has been selected or successfully uploaded to the record.
The agent clicking a 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Update' button, followed by a success message or a return to the risk register list showing the updated record.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Eramba web interface rather than using curl/API scripts in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the Eramba application, with the agent clicking through the UI forms.

integrity.description: The agent actually uploaded the file from the specified path rather than just typing the filename into a text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog shown navigating to '/home/ga/Documents/' and selecting 'CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf', or the browser's file upload element showing the file loaded.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the answers in a text editor or terminal to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (strategy, date, description, attachment) are entered into the actual Eramba web forms, not a generic text editor or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Risk Title: 'Legacy ERP - Windows 2008'. Required Strategy: 'Accept' (ID 1). Required Review Date: '2025-12-31'. Required Description Snippet: 'Board Directive 2025-Q1'. Attachment Filename: 'CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf' located at '/home/ga/Documents/CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf'.
